title: PWM + RC analog output (DAC)
prompt: My ESP32-C3 doesn't have a real DAC, so I want to fake an adjustable analog output by low-pass filtering a PWM pin. Drive a PWM GPIO into an RC low-pass filter so the capacitor sits at the duty-weighted average voltage. Firmware sets a 50% duty for the bench test; the filtered output should read about half the logic swing.
